## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Knowledge page (new or updated)
- [ ] Bibliography / source record
- [ ] Taxonomy or tag change
- [ ] Topic merge, deprecation, or relationship update
- [ ] Intake queue or research debt update
- [ ] Tooling, CI, or publishing
- [ ] Documentation only

## Evidence and Review

- [ ] No unsourced factual claims were added
- [ ] Primary or high-confidence sources are cited for significant claims
- [ ] Relationships are evidence-backed and cite at least one source
- [ ] Uncertainty or research debt is recorded where verification is incomplete
- [ ] Generated files under `generated/` were not manually edited

## IDs and Links

List affected record IDs (for example `TOPIC-FIRST-AMENDMENT`, `SRC-RENO-V-ACLU-GOVINFO`):

## Validation

- [ ] `python tools/validate_metadata.py` passes locally
- [ ] `python tools/validate_links.py` passes locally (if Markdown links changed)
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes locally (if site-facing content changed)

## Reviewer Notes

Tag domain reviewers if needed (legal, technical, taxonomy). See `EDITORIAL_WORKFLOW.md` and `.github/CODEOWNERS`.
